name: Elemental Channeling - Stone Burst
description: Creatures of your choice on the ground within 30 feet make a Strength save. On a failure, a creature takes 2d10 + your cleric level bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone; on a success it takes half damage and is not knocked prone. The ground in a 10-foot radius centered on you becomes rubble and counts as difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.
